name: nen
build: go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/shu ./cmd/shu && go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/ko ./cmd/ko && go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/gyo ./cmd/gyo && go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/en ./cmd/en && go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/ryu ./cmd/ryu && go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/nen-daemon ./cmd/nen-daemon
description: Nen scanner plugin — three external scanner binaries (gyo, en, ryu) that plug into the orchestrator's nen scan protocol. Each binary reads --scope JSON and writes envelope JSON to stdout. Scanners are auto-discovered from the active orchestrator config dir's nen/scanners/ at scan time.

gyo.description: Detects mission metric anomalies (z-score over 7d baseline) and silent worker failures (worker.failed without phase.failed).

en.description: Checks orchestrator binary freshness, stale workspaces, learnings.db embedding coverage, daemon socket health, and metrics.db routing quality.

ryu.description: Surfaces cost trends, model efficiency gaps (Opus vs Sonnet), retry waste, minimal-output phases, and phase.retrying event counts.

query.description: Component health evaluator and nen query entry point. Run 'shu evaluate' to score all nanika components; 'shu query' to inspect the latest results.

commands.status: Aggregated health score (0-100 avg of all components) and critical component count (score < 50) from the latest shu evaluate run.
commands.items: Full component results array from the latest evaluation: component name, score, issues, and trend.

daemon.description: Standalone nen event subscriber. Connects to ~/.alluka/events.sock (falls back to polling ~/.alluka/events/*.jsonl) and routes events to scanner binaries. Findings are stored in ~/.alluka/nen/findings.db.

commands.start: Start the nen event subscriber daemon (foreground; pair with launchd or &)
commands.stop: Send SIGTERM to the running daemon
commands.status: Show daemon PID and active finding count
